Formations.title: Our courses
Formations.subtitle: Office software, languages, AI and social media — clear materials to help you progress at your own pace.

descriptions.eng_beg: Language basics, everyday vocabulary and essential grammar.
descriptions.eng_int: Grammar improvement, listening comprehension and writing skills.
descriptions.eng_adv: Advanced mastery, idioms, nuances and professional communication.
descriptions.bg_beg: Cyrillic alphabet, greetings and basic expressions.
descriptions.bg_int: Conjugation, sentence building and expanded vocabulary.
descriptions.bg_adv: Fluent expression, complex texts and Bulgarian culture.

Carousel.title: Who are we?
Carousel.subtitle: Two complementary profiles, one shared mission: to make learning clearer, more human and more accessible.

founders.name: Simon
founders.bio: In 2017, I volunteered to complete a civic service mission as a digital mediator. My mission was to train staff with disabilities in office software tools. There I discovered a true passion for teaching, which I share with you today.

founders.name: Yasmine
founders.bio: Passionate about languages and intercultural communication, I support learners in mastering French and Spanish. My approach is based on exchange and trust to remove language barriers.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.desc: A question, a quote request, or simply want to know more? Write to us — we reply quickly!

info.fast_desc: We usually reply within 24 to 48 hours.

form.title: Send us a message
form.desc: Fill out the form below and we will reply within 48 hours.

form.message_placeholder: Describe your request in a few lines...
form.rgpd_text: I agree that my data may be used to process my request.

success.title: Message sent!
success.desc: Thank you for your message. We will reply within 48 hours.

contact.error_server: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.q: How do I receive my course after ordering?
items.a: After your request is confirmed and payment is received, you will receive your course as a PDF directly by e-mail, usually within 24 hours.

items.q: Are the courses suitable for complete beginners?
items.a: Yes, absolutely! Our courses are designed to be accessible to everyone, even people who have never used a computer or learned a foreign language.

items.q: Can I buy several courses at the same time?
items.a: Of course! Contact us through this form and specify the courses you want, and we will prepare a grouped quote for you.

items.q: Is there any follow-up or support after purchase?
items.a: Yes, we remain available by e-mail to answer your questions about the content of the course you bought.

items.q: Are the courses available in multiple languages?
items.a: For now, the IT materials are in French. The language courses (Spanish, Bulgarian, English) are designed for French-speaking learners.

1.title: Practise regularly
1.desc: 15 minutes a day is better than 2 hours at the weekend. Consistency is the key to long-term memorisation.

2.title: Take notes
2.desc: Write down important points by hand — it reinforces memorisation far more than simple reading.

3.title: Review with the sheets
3.desc: Keep our cheat sheets close at hand and read them again regularly to anchor the key concepts.

cta.title: Ready to go further?
cta.desc: Discover all our courses or contact us for personalised support.

hero.title: Who are we?
hero.desc: Two people passionate about teaching and knowledge sharing, united to make learning accessible to everyone.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p1: At Domaformalis, we believe that everyone deserves to learn, whatever their starting level, age or situation.
mission.p2: Simon and Yasmine form a complementary team: IT & digital on one side, languages & culture on the other.

simon.p1: In 2017, aged 24, Simon completed an 8-month Civic Service mission as a digital mediator in an ESAT. There he trained staff with disabilities to use computer tools and discovered a true passion for teaching.
simon.p2: Since then, he has put that passion at the service of everyone by creating clear, illustrated training courses that are accessible even to complete beginners.

yasmine.p1: Passionate about languages and cultures, Yasmine is Domaformalis' language lead. She designs learning materials for language study, adapted to all levels.
yasmine.p2: Her kind teaching approach and deep knowledge of each language make her the cornerstone of the project's language courses.

items.title: Accessibility
items.desc: Our courses are designed to be understood by everyone, with no special prerequisites.

items.title: Kindness
items.desc: We believe in a gentle and encouraging teaching approach. Everyone progresses at their own pace, without judgement.

items.title: Openness
items.desc: IT, languages, culture... We cultivate curiosity and openness to the world.

cta.title: Want to know more?
cta.desc: Discover our courses or contact us directly — we reply quickly!

sections.title: 3. Intellectual property
content: All content on the website domaformalis.com (texts, images, logos, courses, layouts, graphics) is protected by copyright and intellectual property law.

Any reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation, in whole or in part, of this content, by any means whatsoever, without the publisher’s prior written permission, is strictly prohibited and constitutes infringement.

sections.title: 4. Personal data
content: Information collected via the contact form (last name, first name, e-mail, message) is used only to respond to your request. It is neither sold nor transferred to third parties.

In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the amended French Data Protection Act of 6 January 1978, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and object regarding your personal data.
To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@domaformalis.com

sections.title: 5. Cookies
content: The website domaformalis.com may use technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the site (language preference, session).
No advertising or tracking cookies are used. No data is transmitted to advertising networks.

sections.title: 6. Liability
content: The publisher strives to provide information that is as accurate as possible. However, it cannot be held liable for omissions, inaccuracies or errors contained on the website.
The publisher cannot be held liable for how the information and content on the website are used. The user is solely responsible for their use.

sections.title: 7. Hyperlinks
content: The website may contain links to other websites. The publisher exercises no control over these sites and disclaims all responsibility for their content.

sections.title: 8. Applicable law
content: This legal notice is governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, only the French courts shall have jurisdiction.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.desc: How we collect, use and protect your personal data.

privacy.updated: Last updated: [TO BE COMPLETED — e.g. March 2026]

sections.title: 1. Data controller
content: The data controller for the data collected on the website domaformalis.com is:
Name / Business name: [TO BE COMPLETED]
Address: [TO BE COMPLETED]
Contact: contact@domaformalis.com

sections.title: 2. Data collected
content: We collect only the data that you voluntarily provide via the contact form:
— Last name and first name
— E-mail address
— Subject and message content
No data is collected automatically for profiling or advertising purposes.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of processing
content: Your data is used exclusively to:
— Respond to your contact or quote request
— Provide you with information about our courses
— Follow up on your request
Your data is never sold, rented or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis for processing
content: The processing of your data is based on your consent (Article 6.1.a GDPR), given when sending the contact form via the dedicated checkbox.
You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us at contact@domaformalis.com.

sections.title: 5. Retention period
content: Your personal data is kept for a maximum period of 24 months from your last contact with us.
Beyond this period, your data is permanently deleted.

sections.title: 6. Recipients of the data
content: Your data is accessible only to members of the Domaformalis team responsible for answering your request.
No processor has access to your personal data, except the website host:
Vercel Inc. — 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States — Vercel Privacy Policy

sections.title: 7. Transfer outside the EU
content: Hosting the website via Vercel may involve a transfer of data to the United States. Vercel adheres to the European Commission’s standard contractual clauses to govern these transfers in accordance with the GDPR.

sections.title: 8. Your rights
content: In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
Right of access: obtain confirmation that your data is being processed and receive a copy of it.
Right to rectification: have inaccurate or incomplete data corrected.
Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data.
Right to object: object to the processing of your data.
Right to portability: receive your data in a structured and readable format.
Right to withdraw consent: withdraw your consent at any time.
To exercise these rights, send an e-mail to: contact@domaformalis.com
We undertake to respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 9. Cookies
content: The website domaformalis.com uses only technical cookies necessary for proper functioning:
— Language preference (localStorage)
— No advertising cookies
— No tracking tools (Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, etc.)
No consent is required for cookies that are strictly necessary for the functioning of the website (Article 82 of the French Data Protection Act).

sections.title: 10. Security
content: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or destruction:
— Secure HTTPS/TLS connection
— Restricted access to data (Domaformalis team only)
— Secure hosting (Vercel)

sections.title: 11. Complaint
content: If you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with the applicable regulations, you may lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority):
CNIL — 3 Place de Fontenoy, TSA 80715, 75334 Paris Cedex 07
Website: www.cnil.fr

hero.title: General Terms of Use
hero.desc: Please read the following terms carefully before using our website and services.

cgu.updated: Last updated: [TO BE COMPLETED — e.g. March 2026]

sections.title: 1. Purpose
content: These General Terms of Use (hereinafter “Terms of Use”) are intended to define the terms of access to and use of the website domaformalis.com, as well as the conditions for purchasing the courses offered.
Any use of the website implies full and unconditional acceptance of these Terms of Use.

sections.title: 2. Website publisher
content: Name / Business name: [TO BE COMPLETED]
Address: [TO BE COMPLETED]
Contact: contact@domaformalis.com
For more details, see our Legal notice.

sections.title: 3. Access to the website
content: The website domaformalis.com is accessible free of charge to any user with Internet access.
The publisher endeavours to keep the website accessible at all times, but cannot be held responsible for interruptions related to maintenance, technical failures or events beyond its control.

sections.title: 4. Services offered
content: Domaformalis offers digital courses in PDF format in the following areas: languages (Spanish, French, Bulgarian, English), office software (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), multimedia, artificial intelligence and social media.
The website also offers free resources (cheat sheets, useful links, practical tips) accessible without prior purchase.

sections.title: 5. Order and delivery
content: Courses are ordered via the contact form or any other means indicated on the website.
After confirmation of the order and receipt of payment, the course is sent by e-mail in PDF format, generally within 24 hours (working days).
The customer is responsible for providing a valid e-mail address. In the event of an incorrect address, a new delivery may be made upon request.

sections.title: 6. Prices and payment
content: Course prices are indicated in euros (€) and are communicated on request via the contact form.
Payment is made according to the arrangements agreed during the exchange (bank transfer, PayPal, or any other proposed method).
[TO BE COMPLETED — e.g. “VAT not applicable, Article 293 B of the French Tax Code” if sole trader]

sections.title: 7. Right of withdrawal
content: In accordance with Article L.221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the right of withdrawal does not apply to digital content supplied on an intangible medium (PDF) whose performance has begun with the consumer’s consent.
By accepting the immediate delivery of the course by e-mail, the customer expressly waives their right of withdrawal.
However, in the event of a technical issue (corrupted file, delivery error), we undertake to resend the course as quickly as possible.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual property
content: All website and course content (texts, images, layouts, logos, PDF materials) is protected by copyright.
The purchase of a course grants a personal, non-transferable right of use. It is strictly forbidden to:
— Reproduce, copy or redistribute the courses
— Share PDF files with third parties
— Use the content for commercial purposes
— Modify or adapt the materials without authorisation
Any violation exposes its author to legal action in accordance with intellectual property law.

sections.title: 9. Liability
content: The courses are designed for informational and educational purposes. The publisher does not guarantee any specific result linked to their use.
The publisher cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damage resulting from the use of the website or the courses.

sections.title: 10. User behaviour
content: The user undertakes to use the website in accordance with the law and good practice. In particular, the user must not:
— Transmit unlawful content via the contact form
— Attempt to access unauthorised parts of the website
— Use the website for spam or unauthorised commercial solicitation

sections.title: 11. Personal data
content: The collection and processing of your personal data are governed by our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 12. Changes to the Terms of Use
content: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. The applicable Terms of Use are those in force on the date you use the website.
It is advisable to consult this page regularly.

sections.title: 13. Applicable law and disputes
content: These Terms of Use are governed by French law.
In the event of a dispute, the parties undertake to seek an amicable solution. Failing that, only the French courts shall have jurisdiction.
